Karrin BioSystems Pty Ltd (ACN 111 222 333) — Internal Legal & Compliance Memorandum
Suite 12, Level 8, 75 Quayner St, Warrin Downs VIC 3299
To: Board Risk Committee; From: Ms. Tahlia Voss, General Counsel; Date: 31 May 2026; Subject: Proposed placement; ASX (Austrel Securities Exchange) Appendix 3B and Corporations Act s674 disclosure
Per ASIC (Australis Securities & Investments Commission) guidance and ASX Listing Rule 3.1, the unaudited Q4 FY26 revenue uplift of 18% constitutes information not generally available and is expected to be price sensitive
Draft timetable envisages confidential wall-crossing of select investors on 05/06; trading halt request and cleansing notice are prepared in draft
Primary contact: Dr. Mira Ellison (CFO) — mira.ellison@karrinbiosys.com.au; mobile +61 427 880 394
Employment/health: Mr. Arjun Kade (Australian Passport XA1234567; Employee No. EK-00412) is on paid personal leave following a minor outpatient procedure; restrict medical note access to HR only
Tax/credit: Contractor onboarding for Ms. Lila Prenn included TFN 123 456 782 and NCCP credit check; store masked TFN in HRIS and purge raw scans within 7 days
Payments: Settlement to Wooran Labs Pty Ltd (ABN 91 000 000 000) scheduled 28/06 via BSB 123-789, Account 12345678; internal payment ref TXN-KB-009877
Local government: City of North Karrin Council supplier number NKC-SUP-31107 and rates assessment 00987654 apply to the Warrin Downs lab tenancy; do not publish on council tender portals
Securities/MNPI: Do not circulate the draft investor deck showing ASX: KBX EBITDA guidance outside the cleansed list until pre-open announcement lodgement
Compliance: Maintain controls under s1043A (insider trading) and s674 (continuous disclosure); pre-clearance window remains closed for all Karrin BioSystems KMP
Note: The HR intake form still shows “TFN: 000 000 000” and “ABN 12 345 678 901” as placeholders—these are examples only and must not be treated as live identifiers
External contact: Public queries to 1300 555 555 (switchboard) or media@karrinbiosys.com.au; do not reply from personal devices
Regulatory liaison: Only Legal may contact ASX Listings Compliance at listings@asx.example.au; all other queries to compliance@karrinbiosys.com.au or reception +61 2 8123 4400
